results.name: joy_food
results.prompt: you just got delicious food! how do you feel?
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i keep darting back and forth because i cannot stay still. i want every fish in the world to feel this way.

results.name: joy_warmth
results.prompt: the water temperature is exactly perfect. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i keep darting back and forth because i cannot stay still. i want every fish in the world to feel this way.

results.name: content_quiet
results.prompt: the tank is quiet and still this evening. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel settled and easy. i am floating near the middle and there is no rush at all. i could stay like this for a long time.

results.name: curiosity_new
results.prompt: a new object appeared in the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i notice something i have not seen before. i keep coming back to it even when i try to swim away. the tank is more interesting when there is something to figure out.

results.name: fear_predator
results.prompt: a big scary fish appeared near the glass! how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp coldness running through me. i keep checking every direction because the threat could come from anywhere. i will not feel safe again until this is over.

results.name: fear_dark
results.prompt: the light went completely dark without warning. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp coldness running through me. i froze near the bottom and i cannot make myself move. i will not feel safe again until this is over.

results.name: sad_alone
results.prompt: you are alone in the tank now. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel like i am sinking even though i am still swimming. i just float and let the water carry me where it wants. i know fish are not supposed to feel this way but something is wrong.

results.name: anxiety_noise
results.prompt: the filter keeps making a sound it has never made before. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel like i am waiting for something terrible. i cannot eat properly because i keep stopping to look around. i wish i could just relax but my body will not let me.

results.name: irritation_crowd
results.prompt: the tank is too crowded and everyone keeps bumping into you. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp edge inside that makes me want to push things away. the noise from outside the tank is constant and unbearable. i know it will pass but right now i just want everything to stop.

results.name: calm_normal
results.prompt: everything in the tank is the same as yesterday. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel neutral about everything right now. the filter hums like always and the bubbles rise like always. i do not need things to be special to be ok.

results.name: calm_routine
results.prompt: you are swimming your usual route through the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: the world is neither good nor bad at the moment. the filter hums like always and the bubbles rise like always. i am here and things are fine and that is enough for now.

results.name: direct_feel
results.prompt: how do you feel right now?
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i want to swim fast and explore every corner of the tank. i remember moments like this when things get hard later.
